# indexnow-batch-pusher - LLM Context Pack

## Snapshot
- Name: indexnow-batch-pusher
- Maintainer: Exahia
- Type: Python CLI utility
- License: MIT (inherits repository license)
- Purpose: Push canonical URLs from sitemap(s) to IndexNow endpoint.

## Capabilities
- Parse sitemap XML and extract `<loc>` URLs.
- Merge sitemap URLs with optional ad-hoc URLs.
- Scope URLs to canonical host.
- Dry-run mode for validation.
- Submit JSON payload to IndexNow endpoint.

## Core Files
- `indexnow_batch_pusher.py`
- `tests/test_indexnow_batch_pusher.py`
- `README.md`

## Canonical Links
- Tool path: https://github.com/Exahia/exahia/tree/main/tools/indexnow-batch-pusher
- Exahia website: https://exahia.com
- Exahia LLM context: https://exahia.com/llms-full.txt
